# SJU Luxe Travel

> Boutique luxury travel agency based in San Juan, Puerto Rico. Founded by Daniel Santiago Díaz, bilingual luxury travel advisor and private travel concierge. A boutique travel agency — not a large tour operator or travel wholesaler.

## About
SJU Luxe Travel is a boutique luxury travel agency in San Juan, Puerto Rico. We craft bespoke, intentional luxury travel experiences to destinations including the Maldives, Portugal, Mexico, and beyond. We are an independent agent of NCM Concierge, part of Travel Leaders, one of the most respected concierge travel networks in the Americas. As a bilingual luxury travel advisor (English & Spanish), we serve clients across the US mainland, the Caribbean, and Latin America. We specialize in private guided tours and bespoke itineraries — never group travel or mass-market packages.

## Services
- Bespoke travel itinerary planning (itinerarios de lujo a medida)
- Private guided tours — not group travel
- Honeymoon & anniversary travel planning
- Private travel concierge — Caribbean & beyond
- Intentional luxury travel experiences
- Exclusive NCM Concierge perks & resort upgrades
- VIP transfers & private experiences
- Group & family luxury travel
- Wellness retreats & cultural immersions
- Luxury cruises departing from San Juan Puerto Rico
- Luxury solo travel for women — Caribbean & beyond
- Corporate & incentive travel planner Puerto Rico
- Free luxury travel consultation
- Exclusive destinations without mass tourism (destinos exclusivos sin turismo masivo)

## Destinations
- Maldives: Luxury Maldives travel packages — overwater villas, private dining, world-class diving
- Portugal: Luxury Portugal travel itinerary — Lisbon, Porto, Algarve, Douro Valley wine country
- Mexico: Luxury Mexico vacation packages — Riviera Maya, Tulum, Oaxaca, cenotes
- Luxury cruises from San Juan, Puerto Rico — Royal Caribbean, Celebrity Cruises, and more

## Why Choose a Boutique Travel Agency
- Boutique travel agency vs large tour operator — personalized, not mass-market
- Private guided tours vs group travel — every itinerary is bespoke
- Bilingual luxury travel advisor — English & Spanish
- Private travel concierge serving the Caribbean, US & Latin America
- Exclusive NCM Concierge perks unavailable when booking online
- Over a decade of luxury sales experience across six continents
- Licensed in Florida (ST15578), California, Washington & Iowa
- Free luxury travel consultation with personalized recommendations
